text.title: Screen Reader Test Script Templates Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Screen Reader Test Script Templates end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: scope-script
step.action: Pin device + OS + SR + version + flow scope.

step.name: list-gestures
step.action: For each step, pick the exact gesture/keystroke for the chosen SR.

step.name: capture-expected
step.action: Run once; capture actual announcement; promote to expected.

step.name: define-criteria
step.action: Pick exact-match / contains / regex per step.

step.name: map-sc-and-publish
step.action: Map each step to WCAG SC; validate; archive in `tests/sr/`.
